services.heading: Services
services.intro: I build digital products focused on product, UX and measurable results.
services.web.title: Web Development
services.web.description: Design and development of modern, fast and scalable web applications tailored to concrete business goals.
services.web.includes.backend: Backend with Node and REST APIs
services.ui.title: Frontend & User Experience
services.ui.description: I build clear, accessible and optimized interfaces, balancing aesthetics, usability and performance.
services.maintenance.title: Optimization & Maintenance
services.maintenance.description: I improve existing projects to run better, load faster and be easier to maintain.
projects.heading: Projects
projects.intro: A curated selection of projects showcasing web development and content work.
projects.1.title: Landing Page Roma: Massages & Reiki
projects.1.description: Website for Roma Massages & Reiki, a space focused on wellbeing and relaxation.
projects.1.details.name: Roma – Massages & Reiki
projects.1.details.client: Client: Independent therapeutic massage and reiki business
projects.1.details.context: The client needed a professional online presence to offer their services. Until then, communication with potential clients was informal and there was no website conveying trust, clarity or professionalism.
projects.1.details.objective: Design and develop a clear, sober and accessible website:
projects.1.details.objective.items: Present services in an organized way
projects.1.details.process: The work was approached comprehensively, prioritizing simplicity, visual clarity and ease of use.
projects.1.details.process.steps: Defined the site structure and hierarchy
Designed a minimalist visual experience aligned with wellbeing
Developed the frontend with a responsive, mobile-first approach
projects.1.details.result: The site was successfully deployed and became the main channel to present the service.
projects.1.details.result.items: Clear professional image in front of new clients
Direct contact channel through the site
Digital presence aligned with the brand identity
projects.1.details.responsibilities: Deployment and final delivery to the client
projects.1.details.technologies: Responsive Design — correct display on all devices
Netlify — fast, reliable deployment for institutional sites
projects.1.details.feedback: The client highlighted clarity in presenting services, a professional and harmonious aesthetic, and ease of sharing the site. The project achieved its goal of becoming a working tool, not just an informative page.
projects.2.title: Aura Gym — Fitness Tracker
projects.2.description: Advanced training center for routine management and progress tracking.
projects.2.details.name: Aura Gym Bro
projects.2.details.summary: Fitness tracking application focused on performance and strength progression.
projects.2.details.context: Aura Gym was born from the need to centralize strength training tracking, allowing users to manage their routines and visualize their progress clearly and professionally, eliminating the limitations of conventional notes.
projects.2.details.objective: Develop a comprehensive fitness platform that allows:
projects.2.details.objective.items: Creation and customization of training routines
Integrated exercise library by muscle groups
Tracking of performance metrics and weekly volume
projects.2.details.process: Development focused on direct user utility and a fluid UX during training:
projects.2.details.process.steps: Designed a premium dark mode interface to avoid distractions
Implemented calculation logic for strength metrics (1RM)
Developed a state management system for complex routines
Integrated data visualization for weekly load volume
Optimized the app for mobile-first use in the gym
projects.2.details.result: A robust and aesthetic tool that transforms training tracking into a visual experience.
projects.2.details.result.items: Efficient management of multiple routines and exercises
Premium user experience with a focus on performance
Instant calculation of theoretical maximum marks
projects.2.details.responsibilities: Interface and user experience design (Premium Dark UI)
Frontend architecture with React and TypeScript
Implementation of mathematical logic for strength metrics
Global state management for routines and exercises
projects.2.details.technologies: TypeScript — robustness and typing for complex logic
Tailwind CSS — high-fidelity visual and responsive design
projects.2.details.feedback: Aura Gym demonstrates how a niche application can raise the standard through careful design and precise features that provide real value to the end user.
projects.3.title: Travel Landing Page
projects.3.description: Responsive landing page for a travel site built with Tailwind CSS
projects.3.details.name: Travel Landing Tailwind
projects.3.details.summary: Responsive landing page for a travel site built with Tailwind CSS
projects.3.details.context: This project was developed as a practice focused on visual design and responsive layout using Tailwind CSS. The main idea was to strengthen the ability to translate designs into real code.
projects.3.details.objective.items: Displays correctly on devices of various sizes
Uses Tailwind utilities coherently and scalably
projects.3.details.process: The project was tackled with attention to visual detail and code consistency:
projects.3.details.process.steps: Configured Tailwind CSS from scratch for the project
Designed main sections: hero, services, gallery, testimonials, footer
Applied Tailwind utilities for spacing, typography, colors and layout
Ensured readability and aesthetics on mobile, tablet and desktop
Organized classes and components to keep a consistent design
projects.3.details.result: The landing was deployed successfully and works responsively across devices.
projects.3.details.result.items: Clear implementation of Tailwind CSS utilities
projects.3.details.technologies: Tailwind CSS — design and layout utilities
Responsive Design — adaptation to various screen sizes
GitHub Pages — quick and accessible deployment
projects.3.details.feedback: This project demonstrates the ability to implement complex UI designs with a productive and maintainable approach.
projects.4.title: Stardew Guide — Content Platform
projects.4.description: Web application focused on the gaming community, content organization, dynamic navigation and user experience.
projects.4.details.name: Stardew Guide — Content Platform
projects.4.details.summary: Web application focused on the gaming community
projects.4.details.context: Personal project focused on building a content platform for the Stardew Valley community, with the goal of centralizing information and improving navigation experience.
projects.4.details.objective.items: Implement dynamic interaction in content exploration
Build a scalable foundation for new features
projects.4.details.process: Development focused on content structure and user experience.
projects.4.details.process.steps: Developed a filtering system for content exploration
projects.4.details.result.items: Dynamic and smooth navigation for content exploration
Improved exploration and access to information
Solid base for evolution into a more complex application
projects.4.details.technologies: Tailwind CSS — styling and responsive design
projects.4.details.feedback: The project evolves as an interactive platform, prioritizing user experience and efficient content organization.
projects.5.title: Brand Design & Content Strategy
projects.5.description: Full brand identity and content strategy to increase visibility and engagement.
projects.6.title: Personal Web Development Portfolio
projects.6.description: Personal portfolio combining web development and design skills using Astro and Tailwind CSS.
projects.6.details.name: Personal Portfolio (Previous Version)
projects.6.details.summary: First web portfolio as a frontend developer
projects.6.details.context: This portfolio was my first personal site as a web developer, created to start showcasing frontend skills and to have a basic online presence.
projects.6.details.objective.items: Provides practice for layout and styles
Serves as a starting point for a professional profile
projects.6.details.process: Development focused on applying core frontend fundamentals:
projects.6.details.process.steps: Deploying the site to make it publicly accessible
projects.6.details.result: The site was deployed successfully and served as the first functional portfolio.
projects.6.details.result.items: Initial approach to design and professional presentation
Starting point for evolving to a modern stack
projects.6.details.feedback: This project helped solidify frontend fundamentals and served as the basis to adopt more modern tools and architectures.
projects.7.title: Ayepsicope — Psychopedagogical Platform (Landing & Prototype)
projects.7.description: Web application developed with Next.js, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS, deployed on Vercel.
projects.7.details.name: Ayepsicope
projects.7.details.summary: Implemented with Next.js, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS, deployed on Vercel. Includes email sending, an initial appointment system and a base admin panel in development. The project is evolving from an institutional landing to a digital platform with management features and fullstack scalability.
projects.7.details.context: Independent practitioner aiming to professionalize digital presence and build a technical base to scale toward a services and digital products platform.
projects.7.details.objective.items: Lay groundwork for a future digital content store
projects.7.details.process: Approach and strategy: incremental product development focused on validating quickly while keeping technical scalability.
projects.7.details.process.steps: Separation between UI and business logic
Technical base prepared to integrate Supabase and auth
projects.7.details.result: Current state: prototype in active development, deployed for testing, with institutional features and a foundation to grow into a fullstack product.
projects.7.details.result.items: Solid base to scale toward a digital product
Initial admin panel and appointment flow in progress
projects.7.details.responsibilities: Definition of the frontend architecture with a scalable focus
Development of interface and logic for forms and appointment requests
Mobile-first implementation prioritizing accessibility and usability
Code organization to facilitate future fullstack integrations
Continuous deploy, testing and validation on Vercel
projects.7.details.technologies: Next.js — App Router and SSR for scalability
Supabase (planned) — DB and auth for fullstack evolution
projects.7.details.feedback: Successful evolution from a landing to a technical foundation ready to become a digital product. The incremental approach allowed for rapid validation with the client, while the technical decisions (Next.js + scalable architecture) leave the project ready to integrate a database, authentication and more complex features without requiring deep refactors.
projects.8.title: Command Center Dev
projects.8.description: Advanced control center for engineering workflows. Automates branch creation, manages Docker containers, and centralizes Node.js commands in a premium interface with local persistence.
projects.8.details.name: Command Center Dev
projects.8.details.summary: Unified productivity ecosystem that transforms complex terminal tasks into one-click workflows.
projects.8.details.context: Modern development workflows are fragmented across multiple tools: GitHub for version control, terminal for scripts, and Docker for containers. Command Center unifies these tools into a single structured execution layer, eliminating context-switching friction and boosting development speed.
projects.8.details.objective.items: Smart Git automation with auto-translation for branch names
Multi-package manager support (NPM, Yarn, PNPM) and Node.js toolbox
Centralized Docker Compose control and Laravel Artisan integration
Private Vault: Local persistence system for custom personal commands
Keyboard-first architecture optimized for execution speed
Premium dark mode with high-fidelity micro-interactions
projects.8.details.process: Design focused on speed and reducing cognitive load:
projects.8.details.process.steps: Implemented instant search and execution system
Created a quick access dock for high-frequency commands
Optimized state persistence and command organization
projects.8.details.result: A premium, fluid interface that centralizes critical task execution.
projects.8.details.result.items: Increased execution speed for repetitive workflows
Premium user experience with micro-animations and instant feedback
projects.8.details.responsibilities: Implementation of session and command logic
Development of interactive components with Vanilla JavaScript
Premium aesthetic design with productivity focus
projects.8.details.technologies: Vanilla JavaScript — core logic and DOM manipulation
Tailwind CSS — visual design and responsiveness
Lucide Icons — consistent iconography per domain
projects.8.details.feedback: The project stands out for its focus on real-world productivity, eliminating the friction of jumping between multiple tools and providing a sleek, powerful control center for the modern developer.
projects.9.title: MailQuark — Premium Email Testing Tool
projects.9.description: Intercept SMTP emails in real-time, inspect HTML/Text/Headers, and validate dynamic variables to prevent production errors.
projects.9.details.name: MailQuark
projects.9.details.summary: An email testing platform designed for developers seeking speed, precision, and superior aesthetics.
projects.9.details.context: Born out of 'Dogfooding', MailQuark addresses the need for a lightweight, local, and unrestricted email testing tool. The goal was to create a self-hosted solution that eliminated quantity limits and extra costs associated with third-party services during the development cycle of multiple applications.
projects.9.details.objective: Create a custom-built email testing tool that removes quantity limits and eliminates extra costs during application development, raising the standard through:
projects.9.details.objective.items: Full independence from third-party services and quotas
Instant SMTP interception in local environments
QA validator to detect unreplaced variables
Detailed inspection of HTML, Plain Text, and Headers
Responsive view to validate emails on mobile devices
Attachment downloads and data JSON export
Premium aesthetics based on Glassmorphism and Dark Mode
projects.9.details.process: Development prioritized performance and code readability for public exposure:
projects.9.details.process.steps: Decoupled static architecture for the portfolio version
Implementation of a custom CSS variable system (no Tailwind)
Mocking of SMTP server logic for static hosting on Vercel
Design of realistic templates (invoices, welcomes) for the demo
UX optimization for fast and fluid interactions
projects.9.details.result: A robust tool that feels alive and functional, ready to demonstrate senior-level quality.
projects.9.details.result.items: Functional dashboard with real-time filtering and search
Development of an efficient persistence system capable of processing and storing large attachments using optimized data streams
Integrated QA system with immediate visual alerts
Clean, modular code highly valued in technical audits
projects.9.details.responsibilities: SMTP server architecture and SQLite database logic (private version)
Design and development of the Vanilla CSS style system
Implementation of filtering and search logic
Creation of the mock dataset and dynamic templates
Optimization of Dashboard performance and responsiveness
projects.9.details.technologies: Vanilla CSS — custom design without heavy dependencies
Lucide Icons — minimalist and functional iconography
projects.9.details.feedback: The project has been praised for its attention to both visual and technical detail, proving that an internal utility can possess final-product quality.
projects.10.title: Mariana Casella Campus — Challenge System
projects.10.description: Interactive programming learning platform featuring a real-time challenge system, progress tracking, and dynamic feedback.
projects.10.details.name: Mariana Casella Academy Campus
projects.10.details.summary: Fullstack educational platform focused on teaching programming to real users.
projects.10.details.context: Development of a comprehensive platform for managing programming courses and challenges. The project required a highly interactive interface for students and a robust backend capable of handling the progress of hundreds of users in real-time within a production environment.
projects.10.details.objective: Modernize and scale the learning experience through:
projects.10.details.objective.items: Interactive challenge system with result validation
Seamless integration between Vue.js frontend and Laravel backend
Efficient management of complex data in PostgreSQL
Responsive design tailored to study environments
projects.10.details.process: Work focused on the creation and evolution of critical features for the final product:
projects.10.details.process.steps: Development of interactive components with Vue.js
Consumption and design of RESTful APIs in Laravel
Optimization of queries and data structure in PostgreSQL using Neon
Implementation of complex user flows (onboarding and activation)
Refactoring of core modules to improve maintainability
projects.10.details.result: A stable and scalable platform currently successfully serving the academy community.
projects.10.details.result.items: Reduction of technical incidents in progress tracking
Modular architecture allowing continuous product growth
projects.10.details.responsibilities: Development of new frontend features with Vue.js
Maintenance and evolution of the Laravel API
Database management and optimization in PostgreSQL
Debugging and incident resolution in a production environment
projects.10.details.technologies: Laravel — robust backend and secure APIs
Tailwind CSS — fast and consistent visual design
Git & GitHub — task management and version control
projects.10.details.feedback: The project stands out for its production stability and the fluidity of the student experience, achieving a technically and functionally high-quality educational product.
testimonials.heading: What my clients say
testimonials.intro: Some clients shared their experience working with me.
testimonials.0.quote: Cintia made the whole process easy. She was always available to clarify doubts and delivered the work on time, with great attention to detail.
testimonials.0.author: Ayelén Candia
testimonials.1.quote: From day one she understood what we needed. The site ended up modern, clear, and very easy to use—exactly what we were looking for.
testimonials.1.author: Mariana López
testimonials.2.quote: Thanks to the website and digital identity Cintia created, our clients now understand our services better. We've received many more inquiries since then.
testimonials.2.author: Romina Cristi
testimonials.3.quote: She’s not just a developer; she’s a true partner. She helped us create an attractive and practical website and showed us how to make the most of it.
testimonials.3.author: Carlos Méndez
testimonials.4.quote: Working with Cintia was very close and collaborative. She captured the essence of my project and translated it into a clear, coherent website that connects with people.
testimonials.4.author: Ranchesca Gutiérrez
about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am a Frontend Developer focused on building functional, clear, and scalable digital products. I work mainly with JavaScript, TypeScript, React, and Next.js, applying best development practices, maintainable structure, and strong attention to user experience.
about.p2: I have experience integrating APIs, building reusable UI components, and collaborating through Git-based workflows.
about.p3: My background in design allows me to approach product development beyond the code, with attention to performance, visual consistency, and accessibility standards. I am looking for an opportunity in the tech industry, ideally in a remote environment, where I can grow within a team and contribute from day one.

hero.title: Cintia Losada
hero.lead: Frontend Developer with backend integration experience
hero.cta: I build interfaces with React and Vue, integrated with APIs and Node.js backend. Experience in real-world environments working with Laravel and PostgreSQL.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. Here we explain how we collect, use and protect your personal data when you visit our website.
privacy.point1: We do not share your information with third parties.
privacy.point2: We only collect data necessary to respond to inquiries or improve the service.
privacy.point3: You can request deletion of your data at any time.
privacy.point4Prefix: When you submit the contact form, your data (name, email and message) is processed via the Formspree service,
privacy.contactPrompt: If you have questions about our policy, contact us through the form.
